case_title: SAMMY HO ET AL VS. STACY LIN-JENSON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HO, SAMMY WU, SELINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIN-JENSON, STACY DBA ARKICHIK $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,115.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-08-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF SAMMY HO & DEFENDANT STACY LIN-JENSON, DBA ARKICHIK. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SELINA WU, WHO IS PRESENTLY OUT-OF-TOWN ON A BUSINESS TRIP. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LIN-JENSON, STACY DBA ARKICHIK
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY HO, SAMMY WU, SELINA AS TO DEFENDANT LIN-JENSON, STACY DBA ARKICHIK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED SEP-30-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIN-JENSON, STACY DBA ARKICHIK
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY HO, SAMMY LIN-JENSON, STACY DBA ARKICHIK
